name: incognito
description: Incognito — privacy-first qualitative text anonymization with desktop (Electron + spaCy/CamemBERT) and browser (Transformers.js) interfaces.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.pack: npm run build:ner:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:ner:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:ner:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac
scripts.dist:mac:spacy: npm run build:ner && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:ner:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win
scripts.dist:win:spacy: npm run build:ner && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:ner:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux
scripts.dist:linux:spacy: npm run build:ner && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux
scripts.dist:all: npm run build:ner:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --win --linux
